posts.author: rargenbright (Becca Argenbright)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Provide users with an outbox or some other view of Sent updates

What are you trying to achieve

I’m looking for a way to easily review all the updates I’ve sent across multiple workspaces.

I know there is a way to review updates at the account level, but not just Sent ones.

As an enterprise admin, it would be extremely helpful to be able to quickly isolate my own sent updates in one spot.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rargenbright ,

If you’re open to apps, Board Email Report can be a workaround for your case. There are 2 types of automated reports on a board and item level. On an item level you can get the following reports:

  • Updates by a specific employee

  • Updates mentioning a specific employee

  • Updates containing attachments

  • Status updates

  • Last updates

You set up automation rules to get reports every day (week, month) with consolidated updates and detailed xls-report as an attachment. This is how the result looks:

image424×469 24.9 KB

image1462×439 83.1 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful. Also, our team can make custom automation for your case in terms of item updates, just reach out to us.
